description: Style NoteBeat the summer heat with sepia's new range of tops. If light colours, comfortable material and fashionable styles is just what you looking for then then this would be the right choice. These stylish and feminine tops could be worn with a pair of black tights or leggings to bring out the intricacies of the top.Product DetailsBlue threeforth sleeve top made of light material, the cuffs have an adjusting band and the top has a round neck collar neck , has a half buttoned placket  and a straight hem with an adjustable strap at the waistMaterial and Care100 % cotton Rinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery & printDry on reverse side under sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
